name: Ginger-Macadamia Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup (1 1/2 sticks) unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Butter an 8x8x2-inch glass baking dish.
3. Mix butter, chocolate, and coffee powder in a heavy medium saucepan. Stir over low heat until smooth. Cool, stirring occasionally.
4. Whisk eggs in a large bowl to blend. Whisk in sugar, vanilla, and salt. Fold in the chocolate mixture. Mix in flour, then nuts and ginger. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake until a tester inserted into the center comes out with moist crumbs still attached, about 40 minutes.
6. Cool in the pan on a rack. Cover and let stand at room temperature overnight.
7. Cut into 16 squares.
